Huangfu Long зҡҮз”«йҡҶ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Huangfu Long (зҡҮз”«йҡҶ)was born in Anding Commandery. Succeeded Zhao Qi. His governance was said to be good as Cang CiвҖҷs. Huangfu Long was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
